title: What includes create_update on Webhooks?

posts.author: Sina (Sina Sultani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys!
I’m wondering. What is included on the create_update mutation on Webhooks. Is that when an entire board is created? The rest I understand, but create_update I’m not sure of. Anybody has a clear explanation? I didn’t get it from the documentation. Thanks!

posts.author: Sina (Sina Sultani)
posts.cookedHtml: I found the answer! Didn’t catch the “Updates” on the documentation.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
